parameters.query:
-- Agregado 1 min + salud + mantenimiento en una sola tx
SELECT fn_unstick_processing(5) AS unstuck;
SELECT fn_move_to_dlq(5)        AS moved_dlq;
SELECT fn_purge_old_hashes()    AS purged_hashes;
SELECT channel,
       COUNT(*)                                              AS total,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='processed')            AS processed,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='failed')               AS failed,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='pending')              AS pending,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='duplicate_24h_skipped') AS duplicates,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='skipped_by_intent')    AS skipped,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='dlq')                  AS dlq
  FROM messages
 WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute'
 GROUP BY channel;

meta.description: Metrics v1.1: fusiona unstick stuck processing + mover DLQ + purgar hashes + agregar 1 min en una sola tx. Añade métricas 'skipped' y 'dlq'.
